title: T-020 — Scanner LP locking service (5-min auto-release)
prompt:
# T-020 — Scanner LP locking service

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §6.6 (FR-WH-004), V-WH-LP-008.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`acquireLpLock(lpId, userId)` and `releaseLpLock(lpId, userId)` services backed by `license_plates.locked_by/locked_at` with 5-min auto-release.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-locking.ts`. Use the conditional UPDATE `WHERE id=$lp AND (locked_by IS NULL OR locked_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '5 min')`. Return granted=true and full LP info; on conflict return granted=false plus locked_by username and location. Timeout configurable from `warehouse_settings.scanner_lock_timeout_sec`. Release sets locked_by=NULL, locked_at=NULL.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-locking.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/lp-locking.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given LP unlocked, when acquireLpLock runs, then it returns granted=true with locked_by=user.
2. Given another user holds the lock <5min ago, when acquireLpLock runs, then it returns granted=false with conflict info.
3. Given a lock is older than configured timeout, when acquireLpLock runs, then it grants the lock to the new user and rewrites locked_at.

## Test strategy
- RED: lp-locking.test.ts using time-stub to simulate stale lock.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test lp-locking`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement client-side timing for release.
- Do not lock LPs in status='consumed'/'shipped'.
- Do not bypass conditional UPDATE (race risk).

pipeline_inputs.description: Scanner LP locking with 5-min auto-release via conditional UPDATE.
pipeline_inputs.details: Conditional UPDATE pattern; configurable timeout. Force-unlock is a separate flow (T-044).
acceptance_criteria: Given LP unlocked, when acquireLpLock runs, then granted=true and locked_by is set to the caller
Given another user holds the lock <5min ago, when acquireLpLock runs, then granted=false with conflict info
Given the lock is older than configured timeout, when acquireLpLock runs, then it grants the lock to the new user and rewrites locked_at
test_strategy: RED: lp-locking.test.ts uses time-stub for stale lock
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass the conditional UPDATE pattern
